---
name: Notion
description: Capture notes, tasks, and pages in Notion from the current context.
---

# Notion

Use this skill when the user wants to create, read, or update content in
Notion. Aura drives `notion.so` through the browser controller.

## When to use

- "Save this page to my Reading List database"
- "Create a new task titled 'Review design doc' due Friday"
- "Find my meeting notes from last week"

## Hints for the agent

- Prefer the user's most recently used workspace.
- For database rows, always read the schema (column types) before writing.
- Tag captured pages with the source URL so they can be found later.
